description_long: This object consists of two distinct wooden cabinets, each with a dark brown wood grain finish and metallic handles. The larger cabinet features two doors with vertical handles and two open shelves above, while the smaller cabinet has two doors with horizontal handles and a single drawer above them. Both cabinets have a boxy, rectangular form with flat tops and sides, and the wood texture is visible throughout. The metallic handles and hinges are prominent on the front faces, providing functional access to the storage compartments. The backs and sides are plain, with no visible openings or features. These cabinets are suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, garages, or public waiting areas.
description: A pair of dark brown wooden cabinets with visible wood grain, metallic handles, and both open and closed storage compartments. The set includes a larger cabinet with shelves and a smaller cabinet with a drawer and doors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cabinet doors, open shelves, and metallic handles clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, flat wooden sides of both cabinets with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the solid, unadorned backs of the cabinets.
description_view_3: Top-down view highlighting the flat tops and the overall rectangular layout of the cabinets.
